div.h1: Deployment Automation — Claude Code + Fabric MCP + REST API
div.p: From empty folder to production warehouse. 95% automated.
Azure Entra ID Service Principal authentication
Azure DevOps Git repo + CI/CD pipeline
Fabric MCP Server dotnet · local-first OpenAPI + item schemas
100+ .sql files tables/ views/ procedures/ 3 files per data table
4 Data Pipelines pl_master, pl_bronze, pl_silver, pl_gold
